steps.t: Faramir's Look-out is located south-east of Osgiliath. You should speak with Gladhir at Faramir's Look-out.
Faramir's Look-out is located south-east of Osgiliath. You should look at Osgiliath from Faramir's Look-out.
Faramir's Look-out is located south-east of Osgiliath. You should talk to Mírthel at Faramir's Look-out about what you saw.
Faramir's Look-out is located south-east of Osgiliath. You should look at the Morgul Vale from Faramir's Look-out.
Faramir's Look-out is located south-east of Osgiliath. You should talk to Arodor at Faramir's Look-out about what you saw.
